title: Assistant Store Manager - Barista - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Barista - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Barista is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Barista:
Barista is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barista!
